title: Popular Community Family Market on 8 November
bodyText:
ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Life Community Services (LCS) will once again host its popular Community Family Market on Saturday 8 November.


> The market promises a wide variety of attractions.


Food stalls will offer delicious fare, including chicken curry and rice, boerewors rolls, pies, pancakes and sweets from the ever-popular Candy Land stand.

Visitors can also enjoy coffee at the on-site café, while families may take part in frisbee golf. Children will be catered for with an adventure park.


> Shoppers can browse through a pre-loved clothing stall, a white elephant table, and hand-crafted goods at the Isipho and Baby Boutique.


The event is presented in partnership with Shofar Church, Frisbee George and Root Café. Entry costs R10 for adults and R5 for children under 12, who must be accompanied by an adult.

It will take place from 09:00 to 13:00 at the LCS premises at 1 Fiskaal Street, Conville.

For those wishing to partner with LCS or make a donation towards the market, contact 044 873 6601 or email [email protected].

Love handmade articles made by the Isipho women will be fore sale.

‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’
